arts.ttl: Everton make enquiry for former Tottenham player – Club happy to listen to all offers
arts.sum: Everton have enquired about AC Milan’s Emerson Royal in the last few hours, while Fulham have a ‘confirmed’ interest in the Brazilian too. That’s according to journalist Matteo Moretto, who says the Italian club will listen to any proposals for the Brazilian full-back.
